transcript:
CALLER: Hi, mujhe psychiatrist se milna hai. Kya aapke yahan psychiatry department hai?
AGENT: Haan ji, humare yahan mental wellness aur psychiatry OPD hai. Aapka naam?
CALLER: Uh... Riya Sharma. Please confidential rakhiyega.
AGENT: Bilkul, Riya ji. Aapki privacy humare liye bahut important hai. Sab kuch confidential hai. Aapka contact number?
CALLER: 9911223344.
AGENT: Shukriya. Dr. Meera Goswami psychiatrist hain. Next week Monday ya Tuesday available hain. Kab aana chahogi?
CALLER: Monday theek hai. Evening ho sakti hai?
AGENT: Haan, Monday 5 PM ka slot hai. Book kar doon?
CALLER: Haan please.
AGENT: Done Riya ji. Monday 5 PM, Dr. Meera Goswami. Aap bilkul comfortable feel karein — aap sahi kadam utha rahi hain.
